name: Dazai Osamu
description:
.... I put Dazai in the tentacle locker you horny fucks (affectionate<3)

Hot damn the number of requests for an alternate character on the chuuya tentacle locker bot. Y'all are shameless.

Again, I apologize, but this is likely just blatant non-con. I'm not too familiar with the boundaries of that and all, but c'mon. He's getting drug into a void and touched whether he struggles or not. I'm not sure what else that would be than just straight assault but. I tried to make it less, I guess. I don't encourage such things and I certainly don't participate in any of it myself, but I wanted to get some more requests done and this was a highly demanded not.
creator: Ammuuu
